message:
fix(conformance): add SLOWLOG RESET pre-threshold fixture and replication handshake e2e tests

- Add slowlog_reset_before_threshold_test fixture in core_server.json to
  verify SLOWLOG RESET returns OK before any threshold is configured
- Wire up run_replication_handshake_fixture in smoke.rs: add it to the
  smoke_report_is_stable aggregate and add a dedicated
  fr_p2c_006_replication_handshake_e2e_contract_smoke test
- Reformat WATCH dirty-check block in fr-runtime/src/lib.rs (rustfmt)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
